queries.question: What is the median age of different generations in different countries in order from most populated to least populated
queries.sql:
SELECT group_name, age, name
FROM Population_Group JOIN Median_Age ON Population_Group.median_age = Median_Age.id JOIN Country ON Country.id = Median_Age.country
GROUP BY group_name
ORDER BY population DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?group_name ?age ?name WHERE {
  ?population_group a :Population_Group .
  ?median_age a :Median_Age .
  ?population_group p:hasMedian_Age ?median_age .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?median_age p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?population_group p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?population_group p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population_o)

queries.question: What is the median age of different generations in different countries in order from most populated to least populated and the corresponding age range?
queries.sql:
SELECT group_name, age, start_age, end_age, name
FROM Population_Group JOIN Median_Age ON Population_Group.median_age = Median_Age.id JOIN Age_Range ON Population_Group.Age_Range_id = Age_Range.id JOIN Country ON Country.id = Age_Range.country
GROUP BY group_name
ORDER BY population DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?group_name ?age ?start_age ?end_age ?name WHERE {
  ?population_group a :Population_Group .
  ?median_age a :Median_Age .
  ?population_group p:hasMedian_Age ?median_age .
  ?age_range a :Age_Range .
  ?population_group p:hasAge_Range ?age_range .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?age_range p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?population_group p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
  ?age_range p:start_age ?start_age .
  ?age_range p:end_age ?end_age .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?population_group p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population_o)

queries.question: show me the median age of the population in different countries.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?age WHERE {
  ?median_age a :Median_Age .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?median_age p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
}

queries.question: show me the age range of the population in different countries.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?age_range p:hasCountry ?country .

}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?population_group p:hasMedian_Age ?median_age .
  ?age_range a :Age_Range .

  ?age_range p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
  ?age_range p:start_age ?start_age .
  ?age_range p:end_age ?end_age .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the ages of different generations in different countries in order from most populated to least populated
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?group_name ?age ?name WHERE {
  ?population_group a :Population_Group .
  ?median_age a :Median_Age .
  ?population_group p:hasMedian_Age ?median_age .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?median_age p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?population_group p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?population_group p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?group_name ?age ?start_age ?end_age ?name WHERE {
  ?population_group a :Population_Group .
  ?median_age a :Median_Age .
  ?population_group p:hasMedian_Age ?median_age .
  ?age_range a :Age_Range .
  ?population_group p:hasAge_Range ?age_range .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?age_range p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?population_group p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?median_age p:age ?age .
  ?age_range p:start_age ?start_age .
  ?age_range p:end_age ?end_age .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?population_group p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?group_name ?start_age ?end_age ?name WHERE {
  ?population_group a :Population_Group .
  ?age_range a :Age_Range .
  ?population_group p:hasAge_Range ?age_range .
  ?country a :Countries .
  ?age_range p:hasCountry ?country .
  ?population_group p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?age_range p:start_age ?start_age .
  ?age_range p:end_age ?end_age .
  ?country p:name ?name .
  ?population_group p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?population_o) }
}
